industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Phinergy Ltd.
summary: Phinergy Ltd. develops clean and high energy-density systems based on metal-air technology. The company offers aluminum-air and zinc-air technology, which provide clean energy generation and storage solutions for various applications in energy backup, electric mobility, and renewable energy storage. It offers energy backup, electric transportation, and energy storage solutions. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Lod, Israel.
